<?php declare(strict_types=1); /** * This file is part of phpDocumentor. * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. * * @link http://phpdoc.org */ namespace phpDocumentor\Reflection\DocBlock\Tags\Factory; /** * @deprecated This contract is totally covered by Tag contract. Every class using StaticMethod also use Tag */ interface StaticMethod { /** * @return mixed */ public static function create(string $body); }
